hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path'); if echo "$FILE" | grep -q '/DFAF/'; then /usr/local/bin/cmake --build /Users/eriksode/Projects/DFAF/build 2>&1 | tail -3 && cp -r /Users/eriksode/Projects/DFAF/build/DFAF_artefacts/Debug/AU/DFAF.component ~/Library/Audio/Plug-Ins/Components/ && echo '✓ DFAF deployed'; fi
